name: EVOLVE_SYSTEM_PROMPT
pattern: /^    EVOLVE_SYSTEM_PROMPT = """你是系统提示词优化器。基于以下信息，优化 Agent/

name: EXTRACTION_SYSTEM_PROMPT
pattern: /^    EXTRACTION_SYSTEM_PROMPT = """你是一个记忆提取器。从对话中识别值得长期保/

name: LLM_ADJUST_SYSTEM_PROMPT
pattern: /^    LLM_ADJUST_SYSTEM_PROMPT = """你是一个记忆优先级评估器。根据近期对话主题/

name: MAX_CRITICAL_INJECT
pattern: /^MAX_CRITICAL_INJECT = 10  # CRITICAL 注入上限，超出留给其他优先级$/

name: PRIORITY_HIGH
pattern: /^PRIORITY_HIGH = 1       # 用户偏好、项目关键决策$/

name: PRIORITY_MEDIUM
pattern: /^PRIORITY_MEDIUM = 2     # 经验教训、工具使用技巧$/

name: REFLECTION_SYSTEM_PROMPT
pattern: /^    REFLECTION_SYSTEM_PROMPT = """你是一个 Agent 元认知分析器。分析以下会话追踪/

name: _DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE
pattern: /^_DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE = 16  # 模块级默认（_init_fonts 后会更新）$/

name: _DEFAULT_TOOL_THRESHOLD
pattern: /^    _DEFAULT_TOOL_THRESHOLD: int = 2048  # 默认工具输出阈值: 2KB$/

name: _DIZHI
pattern: /^_DIZHI = "子丑寅卯辰巳午未申酉戌亥"$/

name: _LUNAR_MONTHS
pattern: /^_LUNAR_MONTHS = "正二三四五六七八九十冬腊"$/

name: _MCP_LOOP
pattern: /^_MCP_LOOP = None  # 持久事件循环（后台线程）$/

name: _SHENGXIAO
pattern: /^_SHENGXIAO = "鼠牛虎兔龙蛇马羊猴鸡狗猪"$/

name: _TEXT_FILE_THRESHOLD
pattern: /^    _TEXT_FILE_THRESHOLD: int = 16384    # 文本\/日志文件阈值: 16KB$/
